works.title: Encyclopédie
works.title_zh: 百科全書，或科學、藝術和工藝詳解詞典

description: 法國哲學家、藝術評論家、作家
bio: 德尼·狄德羅（法語：Denis Diderot，1713年10月5日—1784年7月31日）是法國啟蒙思想家、唯物主義哲學家、文學家、美學家和翻譯家，百科全書派的代表人物。他的最大成就是以二十年之功主編《百科全書，或科學、藝術和工藝詳解詞典》（通稱《百科全書》）。此書是18世紀啟蒙運動的最高成就之一。
description_en: French Enlightenment philosopher writer and encyclopædist (1713–1784)
bio_en:
Denis Diderot (; French: [dəni did(ə)ʁo]; 5 October 1713 – 31 July 1784) was a French philosopher, art critic, and writer, best known for serving as co-founder, chief editor, and contributor to the Encyclopédie along with Jean le Rond d'Alembert. He was a prominent figure during the Age of Enlightenment.
Diderot studied philosophy at a Jesuit college, then considered working in the church clergy before briefly studying law. When he decided to become a writer in 1734, his father disowned him. He lived a bohemian existence for the next decade.
